nasb.text: Moses the servant of the Lord and the sons of Israel defeated them; and Moses the servant of the Lord gave it to the Reubenites and the Gadites and the half-tribe of Manasseh as a possession.

esv.text: Moses, the servant of the Lord, and the people of Israel defeated them. And Moses the servant of the Lord  gave their land for a possession to the Reubenites and the Gadites and the half-tribe of Manasseh.

cnv.text: 耶和華的僕人摩西和以色列人把這兩個王擊殺了。耶和華的僕人摩西把地分給流本人、迦得人和瑪拿西半個支派的人作產業。

ccb.text: 耶和华的仆人摩西带领以色列人征服了这两个王，摩西把他们的土地分给吕便支派、迦得支派和玛拿西半个支派的人作产业。
